name: Chris Christie
subject: Welcome to the Team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leadership Matters for America PAC, Inc
body:
Thanks for signing up to receive Leadership Matters updates. | | |
---|---|---
| [](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/25199518:25657631139:m:1:814075090:de01383375a8c37257ec41e00fd6271b:r) |
| |
| Hello!
Thanks for signing up to receive updates from Leadership Matters. We're looking forward to promoting real leadership in America. I'm excited that you've decided to join us!

We'll be in touch with more updates soon, but in the meantime, [**please consider making a small donation**](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/25199795:25657631139:m:1:814075090:de01383375a8c37257ec41e00fd6271b:r).

Thanks again,
Governor Chris Christie
|

| Contributions to Leadership Matters for America PAC, Inc. are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Leadership Matters for America PAC, Inc., is a federal nonconnected political action committee that is registered and files reports with the Federal Election Commission. Contributions by corporations, labor unions, national banks, foreign nationals, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law limits contributions to Leadership Matters for America PAC, Inc. to $5,000 per calendar year from individuals and federal PACs. Contributions made in the name of another are strictly prohibited. |
